name: IRC_LC_PROCESS_DEF_HISTORY
description: Stores the process history tracking data.

columns.Name: PROCESS_DEF_HISTORY_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key for this table

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: The process Id associated with the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_PROCESSES_B table

columns.Name: SUB_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: The sub process Id associated with the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_PROCESSES_B table

columns.Name: EVENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: The event type id of the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_HIST_EVENT_B table

columns.Name: EVENT_DATE
columns.Comments: The event date of the History Event

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The person Id who performed the History Event. Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table

columns.Name: ROUTING_STEP_ID
columns.Comments: The routing step Id associated with the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_ROUTING_STEPS_B table

columns.Name: TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: The routing step type code associated with the History Event

columns.Name: SEQUENCE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The routing step sequence number associated with the History Event

columns.Name: PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: The routing step phase Id associated with the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_PHASES_B table

columns.Name: STATE_ID
columns.Comments: The routing step state Id associated with the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_STATES_B table

columns.Name: ACTION_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: The action usage Id associated with the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B table

columns.Name: TRIGGER_EVENT_CODE
columns.Comments: The action usage trigger event code associated with the History Event.

columns.Name: SETTING_ID
columns.Comments: The setting Id associated with the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_LC_SETTINGS_B table

columns.Name: ITEM_KEY_NAME
columns.Comments: The setting item key name associated with the History Event

columns.Name: REF_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: The function expression ref type code associated with the History Event

columns.Name: EXPRESSION_REF_ID
columns.Comments: The expression ref id associated with the History Event. Foreign Key to IRC_FN_EXPRESSION_REFS table

columns.Name: VALUE
columns.Comments: The value modified by the History Event

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
